Case providers take config and context only; selection keys must be
strings.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind  string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
	Level int    `yaml:"level"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.level
type Cache interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type MemCache struct{}

func (*MemCache) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=mem
func NewMemCache() *MemCache { return nil }

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Greet(name string) string
}

type Pool struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewPool() *Pool { return &Pool{} }

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Greet(name string) string { return name }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory(p *Pool) *Memory { return nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type API struct {
	Store store.Store
	Cache store.Cache
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (a *API) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:9:1: config key "store.level" is int, not string
  help: the selection switches on a string kind
error: store/store.go:36:16: case provider parameters must be //fabrik:config structs or context.Context
  help: construct other dependencies inside the provider, so unselected implementations cost nothing
